_comment: DEMO mock readiness snapshot for the React Evidence Console in mock mode. Mirrors the real blocked launch gate; it is illustrative and is never a READY/PASS claim. Live mode reads the real read-only artifact instead.
summary_line: Evidence Console scope: BLOCKED | features=7/7 | deferred_gui=5/5 | prerequisites=3/5
claim_boundary: DEMO mock snapshot. This surface is an Evidence Console prototype only. Launch readiness remains blocked until validated customer completed-project shadow evidence is attached; synthetic or demo cases must not close this gate.

summary.next_action: attach validated customer completed-project shadow evidence
